R0183.title: Virtual Land/Asset Fraud
R0183.definition: Fraudulent activities in metaverse virtual land or digital asset transactions, including false sales, duplicate sales, and price manipulation.
R0183.description: Metaverse virtual land and asset trading markets face multiple fraud risks: project teams falsely promoting scarcity before over-issuing, selling the same plot to multiple people, manipulating scarce land prices before dumping, forging virtual asset ownership certificates, false promises of future returns, etc. Due to lack of unified regulation and ownership verification mechanisms, investor rights protection is difficult and financial losses are hard to recover.
R0183.influence: Investor financial losses, virtual asset ownership disputes, metaverse market trust collapse.
